title: JWT verification fails with public key
symptom: When using a public key to verify a JWT in n8n, an error occurs despite successful verification on jwt.io.
not_this_if: JWT verification works with other keys
Using a different JWT node configuration
root_cause: n8n's JWT node requires the public key to be in a specific format. If the key is in the 'BEGIN CERTIFICATE' format, it may not be recognized, leading to verification failures.
fix_steps: Export the public key in the correct format (BEGIN PUB KEY).
Use OpenSSL to convert the certificate to the public key format.
Upload the converted public key to the n8n JWT node configuration.
agent_instruction: Convert your public key to the 'BEGIN PUB KEY' format and upload it to the JWT node.
